mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, employee_no AS employeeNo, email AS email, name AS name, phone AS phone, position AS position, created_at AS createdAt, sys_ck AS sysCk FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}
SELECT user_code, password_hash FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}

SELECT p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, LISTAGG(r.role_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.role_name) AS roles FROM project_role_user pru JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = pru.project_code JOIN role r ON r.role_code = pru.role_code WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY p.project_code, p.project_name ORDER BY p.project_name

SELECT g.group_code AS groupCode, g.gr_name AS groupName, p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, LISTAGG(r.role_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.role_name) AS roles FROM group_member gm JOIN "GROUP" g ON g.group_code = gm.gr_code LEFT JOIN gr_pro_role gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = gpr.project_code LEFT JOIN role r ON r.role_code = gpr.role_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY g.group_code, g.gr_name, p.project_code, p.project_name ORDER BY g.gr_name, p.project_name
